basic_details.job_title: CURAJ Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 16 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) has officially announced the Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 with 16 vacancies on a contract basis. The notification was released under Advertisement No. CURAJ/R/F.176/Rectt./2026/5996. Candidates who meet the age criteria as per University/GOI rules and possess a Master's Degree in the relevant discipline with NET/Ph.D. qualifications (or other prescribed qualifications for specific posts) are eligible to participate in the walk-in recruitment process. Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of ₹60,000. Check the official notification

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: All Posts: As per University/GOI rules. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/Physically challenged - As per University/GOI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in relevant discipline with NET/Ph.D. as per post. Some posts require Bachelor's Degree in HMCT with experience.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor, Department of Mathematics: Master's Degree in Mathematics with at least 50% marks and at least 55% in two preceding examinations, NET in Mathematical Sciences. Ph.D. exempted from NET. Assistant Professor, Department of Physics: Master's Degree in Physics with at least 55% marks (UR) or 50% marks (OBC) and at least 60% (UR) or 55% (OBC) in two preceding examinations, NET in Physics. Ph.D. exempted from NET. Assistant Professor, Department of Economics: Master's Degree in Economics with at least 55% marks and at least 60% in two preceding examinations, NET in Economics. Ph.D. exempted from NET. Assistant Professor, Department of Yoga: Master's Degree in Yoga/Yoga Therapy/Yogic Science with at least 55% marks and at least 60% in two preceding examinations, NET in Yoga. Ph.D. exempted from NET. Assistant Professor, Department of Health Sciences: Master's Degree in Neuroscience/Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Pathology/Life sciences/Medical Laboratory Technology/ or allied disciplines with at least 55% marks (UR) or 50% marks (SC) and at least 60% (UR) or 55% (SC) in two preceding examinations, NET in Life Sciences. Ph.D. exempted from NET. Desirable: Ph.D. in relevant subject. Assistant Professor, Department of Hotel & Tourism Management: Minimum 4 years Bachelor's Degree in HMCT and/or 2 years Master's Degree in HMCT or relevant disciplines with First Class or equivalent in any one of the two degrees. For UR: at least 55% marks in Master degree and at least 60% in two preceding examinations. For OBC: at least 50% marks in Master degree and at least 55% in two preceding examinations. Ph.D. degree in the relevant field or cleared UGC NET in relevant subject. OR Minimum 4 years Bachelor's Degree in HMCT with First Class or equivalent and minimum of 5 years of relevant experience at a managerial level. OR First class at Bachelors (3 year degree or Diploma after 10+2 in HMCT) or equivalent and Master Degree in Hotel Management and Catering Technology (or in relevant discipline) with First Class or equivalent either in Bachelors or Master Degree. Ph.D. degree in the relevant field or cleared UGC NET in relevant subject. Assistant Professor, Department of Linguistics: Master's Degree in Linguistics with at least 50% marks and at least 55% in two preceding examinations, NET in Linguistics. Ph.D. exempted from NET. Assistant Professor, Department of Pharmacy: Basic degree in Pharmacy (B. Pharm.), Registration as Pharmacist, Master's degree (M. Pharm.) with 60% marks (UR) or 55% marks (ST). Category (or an equivalent grade) in Pharmacology specialization of Pharmacy. For UR: at least 55% marks in Master degree and at least 60% in two preceding examinations. For ST: at least 50% marks in Master degree and at least 55% in two preceding examinations. Desirable: Ph.D. in Pharmacy. Assistant Professor, Department of Vocational Studies and Skill Development (Mechanical): ME / M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering / Materials and Metallurgical Engineering/ Materials Engineering with specializations in Robotics / Mechatronics / Industrial Automation and allied subjects OR More than 3 yrs of experiences in industries with BE / B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering with specializations in Robotics / Mechatronics/ Industrial Automation /allied subjects etc. OR Ph.D. in the relevant field with specialization Robotics / Automation / Allied subjects are eligible. At least 55% in Master degree and at least 60% in at least two preceding examinations. Assistant Professor, Department of Vocational Studies and Skill Development (Electronics and Communication): ME/M.Tech in ECE/Electrical Engg./Electronics and Instrumentation | Cyber Security with specializations in VLSI and Embedded/IOT and Sensors/Control system/Industrial Automation Materials Engg /Nanotechnology/Mechatronics/ Robotics and allied subjects. OR More than 3 yrs of experiences in industries with BE/B.Tech in ECE/ Electrical Engg./ Electronics and Instrumentation with specialization in VLSI and Embedded / IOT and Sensors / Control system/Industrial Automation /allied subjects. OR Ph.D in the relevant field with specialization in IOT, VLSI Design/ Embedded /Sensor and allied subjects are eligible. Assistant Professor, Department of Sports Psychology: Master's Degree in Sports Psychology /Psychology with at least 55% marks and at least 60% in two preceding examinations, NET in Psychology. Ph.D. exempted from NET. Assistant Professor, Department of Architecture: Bachelor's degree in Architecture or equivalent to B.Arch. and M. Arch/M. Plan or equivalent Architecture with at least 55% marks at the Master's Degree, at least 55% marks in two preceding examinations, and One year of relevant professional experience.

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor: Consolidated monthly salary of ₹60,000/- (Rupee Sixty Thousand) per month only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by CURAJ?
faq.answer: Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) has announced a total of 16 vacancies for the post of Assistant Professor on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for CURAJ Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly salary of ₹60,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Generally, a Master's Degree in the relevant discipline with NET/Ph.D. is required. Some specific posts may have additional or alternative qualifications, including Bachelor's Degree in HMCT with experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for the posts will be as per University/Government of India rules, with relaxations applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Physically challenged candidates.

faq.question: Q6. When are the walk-in interviews scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on different dates from July 6, 2026, to July 16, 2026, depending on the department/post.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted at the Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) office in Kishangarh, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for CURAJ?
faq.answer: The official website for Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) is www.curaj.ac.in, where candidates can find more details and the application form.
